Video.summary: Victims and survivors of Jeffrey Dahmer say they want people to see him for who he really was -- not the glamorized TV version. See a never-before-aired interview with Dahmer’s father and stepmother that sheds light on the monster behind the man. They provide chilling details about his bizarre childhood behaviors. Plus, the Netflix series Dahmer - Monster: The Jeffrey Dahmer Story pushed a decades-old story into today’s spotlight, some say giving it a 2022 “pop culture moment.” After the series debuted, Dahmer’s infamous glasses went up for sale for $150,000, and people dressed up as the notorious serial killer for Halloween. Has our culture’s obsession with true crime desensitized us?
Video.title: Exclusive: Jeffrey Dahmer's Father

Video.summary: How well do you know your neighbors, your friends or even your child's teacher? An estimated four to eight million people in North America are swinging in the suburbs " mostly middle-class folks from all walks of life. Dr. Phil takes you inside the secret world of swingers, a lifestyle where couples swap partners.
Video.title: Secrets in the Suburbs

Video.summary: t’s been almost four months since 5-year-old Summer Wells vanished from her home in rural Tennessee on June 15, 2021. Her parents, Don and Candus, say they believe their daughter was abducted. But, the couple say online bullies have accused them of having something to do with Summer’s disappearance. Don and Candus agreed to sit down with body language experts Scott Rouse and Greg Hartley, interrogators who have worked with the FBI, law enforcement and the military and have been referred to as a human lie detector, in hopes of clearing their name. Find out what the men think and if Dr. Phil agrees with their findings.
Video.title: Summer Wells Vanishes (Part 1)

Video.summary: Pamela says in just nine days, she is likely going to jail for not complying with court orders because she refuses to allow her ex, Justin, his court-ordered visitations with their children. Pamela says she believes Justin is a dangerous narcissist who she claims has locked the kids out of the house and attempted to drown their oldest daughter in the pool. Pamela says she will do whatever it takes to protect her kids from Justin, even if that means going to jail. Justin claims Pamela is a hateful, controlling, bitter ex, who has brainwashed their children into making up stories, and says Pamela’s claims of abuse are lies! These parents have been back and forth to court and claim nothing has been resolved. So, who is telling the truth? Is Justin an abusive father, or is Pamela a jealous ex making up stories for revenge? Can Dr. Phil get these parents on the same page for the sake of their children? Find out!
Video.title: Custody Battle

Video.summary: When you get married, you look forward to a life filled with love, happiness and security. But what if you find out your spouse has been telling you lies and is someone completely different than the person you thought you knew?
Video.title: Lies And Betrayal

Video.summary: More couples get divorced in the first year of marriage than any other. Dr. Phil talks with newlyweds in crisis about having realistic expectancies and re-negotiating within the relationship.
Video.title: Was Our Marriage a Mistake?

Video.summary: A Meddling Mother-in-Law or a Lying Cheating Daughter-in-Law? Dr Phil delves into the family drama.
Video.title: Toxic and Offensive Inlaws

Video.summary: Do you know someone who likes to pass the buck, point fingers and play the blame game, instead of taking responsibility and apologizing? Dr. Phil's guests are ready to confront a loved one who refuses to say they're sorry.
Video.title: You Owe Me An Apology!

Video.summary: When you imagine getting an inheritance, will your financial problems be solved or can the money be more trouble than it’s worth?
Video.title: Fighting Over the Will

Video.summary: Bill says he believes he is a narcissist after pushing away almost all of his loved ones, including his brother Tom and daughter Bridget, who both stopped speaking to him. After a tense reunion with Tom, Bill gets emotional when Dr. Phil reunites him with Bridget. After violent fights, cruel words, and selfish behavior, will Bill start taking accountability and change?
Video.title: “I Think I'm A Narcissist!"

Video.summary: From spending $600,000 on 3-year-old beauty queens, to pushy stage sisters and an ambitious boxing coach — today's guests say they go to the extremes to help the youngest members of their family excel. Meet two fathers, one whose full-time job is managing his tiny stars' careers, and the other who hand makes each and every one of his 4-year-old daughter's costumes. Are these dads bonding with their daughters or simply pushing too hard? Plus, meet several women who defiantly criticize child beauty pageants. And, hear from one overzealous sister and the father of a boxing champion once ranked first in the world. Can Dr. Phil convince these guests to step aside and strive for balance in their children's lives?
Video.title: Competing For The Title

Video.summary: Dr. Phil’s guests say they’re not getting any younger, and the race is on to say “I do.” Sharon is 48 and says her biological clock is ticking away. She recently got engaged to a man whom she acknowledges is flawed, and she says her family doesn’t approve of her husband-to-be. Can she get them to accept her beau before they walk down the aisle, or do her relatives have a reason to be concerned? Then, Shea from the reality show Southern Belles: Louisville says that as she was planning her big day, she learned that her fiancé allegedly cheated. Now that the wedding is off, can Shea pick up the pieces and move on? Plus, a dating coach explains the biggest dating mistakes women make.
Video.title: Race to the Altar

Video.summary: A mother admits to putting hot sauce in her 7-year-old adopted son's mouth.
Video.title: Mommy Confessions

Video.summary: Children accuse their dad of neglect.
Video.title: Deadbeat Dads

Video.summary: Three wives send their husbands to Dr. Phil's Man Camp for an attitude adjustment.
Video.title: Man Camp Part 1

Video.summary: Every day, many teen girls fear for their lives because of obsessive, controlling and abusive boyfriends, and it’s another reason why Dr. Phil is so passionate about his campaign to End the Silence on Domestic Violence. Seventeen-year-old Samantha sent an urgent plea for help to Dr. Phil. She says her ex-boyfriend, Aaron, called her nonstop for weeks and sent her threatening text messages after she broke up with him. After Samantha changed her number, he began calling her mother repeatedly. Samantha says he showed up unannounced at her house and pounded on the door for 45 minutes while she cowered in a locked closet. She says she’s afraid Aaron could even kill her. Dr. Phil sits down with the two teens to help Samantha get her message to Aaron loud and clear. And, Tiffany, 20, has a cautionary tale of survival every teen needs to hear. It could save her life!
Video.title: Teens Obsessed With Love

Video.summary: Parents Liz and Jim say their 16-year-old son, Nic, has a serious drug problem that has such a hold on him, they claim he even stole $75,000 in gold from his parents’ safe and spent it all on drugs! But, Liz says she is convinced that her husband is to blame. Liz accuses Jim of being a narcissist and misogynist, whose parenting philosophy is based on intimidation and abuse, and claims that is what drove their son to drugs. Jim denies Liz’s allegations, claiming she has gone to great lengths to paint him as a villain. He says she is the major problem, and calls her the world's lousiest parent and a doormat who helped enable Nic's deadly addictions.
Video.title: Teen Drug Problem (Part 1)

Video.summary: Dr. Phil shares advice for dealing with rude, crude and obnoxious behavior from your family members.
Video.title: My Annoying Family

Video.summary: Angelique recounts escaping a life-threatening scheme while pregnant.
Video.title: Barely Escaping a Fetal Abduction

Video.summary: We've all heard of in-laws who don't get along, but these guests say their problems have become scary and even life-threatening.
Video.title: In-Law Threats!

Video.summary: A woman who vanished reveals a dark secret.
Video.title: A Daughter’s Dark Confession

Video.summary: You hear about scams all the time - e-mails and voicemails claiming you have won valuable prizes. Dr. Phil is outraged by what some scammers are doing to him, his family and his viewers. One website offers a Dr. Phil quiz to win $5,000 every hour, another says it has the official Dr. Phil personality test, but even more shocking are 800 numbers that take callers' money for the promise of over the phone therapy with Dr. Phil and Robin. But these 800 numbers connect innocent victims with con artists posing as Dr. Phil staff members. The fake staffers ask anywhere from $375 to $1,000 for consultation time that obviously never takes place.
Video.title: DP Scam - Part One

Video.summary: Rheta says her four-and-a-half-year marriage to Mark is headed down a rocky road, and her mother-in-law, Deb, is in the driver's seat. Rheta says it's time for Mark to cut the cord with the woman she calls deceitful, backstabbing, sneaky and controlling -- or else! Meanwhile, Deb says she hates Rheta, claiming she's violent, trashy and undeserving of her son. The tension between the women has escalated to blows on more than one occasion, leaving Mark literally in the middle. Where do his loyalties lie? Hear the drastic measures Deb has taken to get Rheta out of their lives. And, did Rheta reveal a secret in the hopes of ruining Deb's 31-year marriage? Is this a case of an overprotective mom overstepping her boundaries, or a wife's resentment getting the best of her? Dr. Phil mediates this war of words and helps to draw some lines in the sand. Whose side will Mark be on? Can this marriage and family be saved?
Video.title: Cut The Cord (PT.1)

Video.summary: Shot in the face, disfigured for life, the former teen victim comes face to face with the girl who pulled the trigger. Can she forgive?
Video.title: The Girl Who Shot Me in the Face

Image.alt: The Girl Who Shot Me in the Face
The Girl Who Shot Me in the Face
The Girl Who Shot Me in the Face
The Girl Who Shot Me in the Face
The Girl Who Shot Me in the Face
The Girl Who Shot Me in the Face
The Girl Who Shot Me in the Face

Video.summary: In the last 10 years, the number of women arrested for driving drunk has risen by 30 percent, and police report that more and more young children are sitting in the back seat when these moms are pulled over.
Video.title: Drunk Driving Moms

Video.summary: Can married people be friends with someone of the opposite sex without sex getting in the way? At what point does a friendly relationship become an affair of the heart or emotional infidelity? Meet Randy, who says his wife, Amanda, has crossed that line.
Video.title: Affairs of the Heart

Video.summary: Some believe self-censorship is a big problem today, particularly in light of the idea that someone can be "canceled" for their words -- blocked from having a prominent public platform or career for sharing their opinion. Dr. Phil interviews Nate, a former Idaho police officer, who claims he was fired after making a TikTok video about NBA superstar LeBron James that went viral and has been viewed over 4 million times. Nate explains how the fall-out from the video affected him and his family, too. Dr. Phil also speaks with conservative political commentator Tomi Lahren, who says she recently had to be protected by state police from student protestors at the University of New Mexico. Greg Lukianoff, president of the Foundation for Individual Rights and Expression, says he believes Americans have lost the ability to discuss their differences rationally. And, Dr. Shaun Harper, founder and Executive Director of the USC Race and Equity Center, says he is firmly against hate speech and feels people need to be more mindful about the effects of their words.
Video.title: You Can’t Say That! Pt 1

Video.summary: Dr. Phil continues his look at a teacher sex scandal that has a school and families divided in a small town in Texas. High school teacher Joelle Ogletree faces accusations of sexual misconduct with some of her male students. Hear both sides of this gripping sex scandal from the accuser and the accused, and judge for yourself if justice has been served.
Video.title: Teacher Sex Scandal (PT. 2)

Video.summary: Em says her husband, Shawn, has cheated on her with at least 78 women -- so why does she keep taking him back? Shawn admits to at least 20 affairs but says it’s his wife’s fault that he strays.
Video.title: Why Men Cheat

Video.summary: A woman says her ex-husband enables their daughter's addiction.
Video.title: My Ex Is Slowly Killing Our Child

Image.alt: My Ex Is Slowly Killing Our Child
My Ex Is Slowly Killing Our Child
My Ex Is Slowly Killing Our Child
My Ex Is Slowly Killing Our Child
My Ex Is Slowly Killing Our Child
My Ex Is Slowly Killing Our Child
My Ex Is Slowly Killing Our Child

Video.summary: In Part 3 of the Man Camp Series, couples fighting to save their marrages deal with family issues, infidelity, and unexpected visitors.
Video.title: Man Camp Part 3

Video.summary: Rylee, 26, admits she’s a sugar baby and says she has no shame in dating wealthy, married men she meets online in exchange for money and lavish gifts -- and three years ago, she even convinced her mother, Tanya, to join her. Dr. Phil sits down with this mother/daughter sugar baby team, who insist they never have sex with their clients. What “services” do they say these men are paying for? And how does their family feel about their lifestyle? Then, Ashley admits she has had a side job as a sugar baby for years but has yet to tell her fiancé, Cesar -- and she wants Dr. Phil to help her confess. How will Cesar respond? And, reality TV star Kendra Wilkinson opens up about her husband, Hank Baskett’s, alleged affair with a transsexual. Does she believe the rumors? And, can her marriage survive the turmoil?
Video.title: The Secret World of Sugar Babies

Image.alt: The Secret World of Sugar Babies
The Secret World of Sugar Babies
The Secret World of Sugar Babies
The Secret World of Sugar Babies
The Secret World of Sugar Babies
The Secret World of Sugar Babies
The Secret World of Sugar Babies
